footer.description: Limoneo brings together browsable catalog pages, verified checkout, and real support so every order keeps its full context.
footer.help_body: If you need to review an order, a return, or a payment issue, use the site channels so support starts with the right context.

home.hero_title: Discover curated collections ready to ship today
home.hero_subtitle: We pick the best in electronics, fashion, home and more so you can find what you need fast.
home.catalog_refresh_note: We refresh inventory and offers several times a day.

checkout.title: Checkout
checkout.subtitle: Review your order, confirm your details, and choose the best shipping option before completing payment.
checkout.hero_title: Confirm your order with address, shipping, and totals synced in real time.
checkout.hero_body: Checkout now shares layout, address flows, and state with the rest of the storefront so the payment handoff keeps its full context.
checkout.summary_subtitle: Includes your items, contact details, address, and shipping benefits.
checkout.items_empty: Your cart is empty. Add products to continue.
checkout.user_guest_warning: You must sign in to complete checkout.
checkout.address_body: Use the same profile address book to create, edit, set default, and pick the address for this order.
checkout.address_guest_hint: Sign in or create an account to manage your addresses.
checkout.address_empty: You don't have any saved addresses.
checkout.address_empty_body: Add your first address to unlock payment and keep recalculations inside checkout.
checkout.benefit_1: Reliable delivery with tracking on all available options.
checkout.benefit_2: Secure payments with fraud protection and advanced encryption.
checkout.benefit_3: 24/7 support to answer questions and handle issues.
checkout.benefit_4: Multiple payment methods, including Stripe and PayPal.

benefits.tracking_body: Each option shows ETA and cost before you pay.
benefits.payment_body: Stripe and PayPal only start after address and session validation.
benefits.traceability_body: Coupon, shipping, and payment references stay in the same operational summary.
benefits.addresses_body: Profile and checkout use the exact same address flow.

checkout.coupon_applied_body: The order summary has been updated.
checkout.shipping_updated_body: The shipping selection was saved successfully.
checkout.sync_note: Totals react instantly when shipping, coupon, or quantities change.
checkout.tax_note: Includes applicable taxes. Final charges will reflect the selected shipping method.
checkout.stripe_redirect_failed: Stripe could not continue the payment.
checkout.stripe_error_body: The payment gateway could not be opened.
checkout.paypal_link_missing: PayPal approval link was not received.
checkout.cart_update_failed_body: The product quantity could not be updated. Please try again.
checkout.payment_disabled_hint: You need a valid address to continue to payment.

detail.lines_subtitle: Each line can manage its own cancellation or return when the current status allows it.

about.title: About Limoneo
about.intro_1: Limoneo is a platform dedicated to offering you the best products on the market, with an intuitive, fast, and secure user experience.
about.intro_2: Our goal is to make your shopping process easier by providing transparency, trust, and personalized support.

clear_nav.label: Clear navigation:
clear_nav.body: Accessible menus and filters to easily find what you're looking for.

simple_checkout.label: Simple checkout:
simple_checkout.body: Optimized cart and checkout to reduce steps and errors.

security_privacy.label: Security & privacy:
security_privacy.body: Your data is protected and never shared with third parties.

fast_support.label: Fast support:
fast_support.body: Customer support available to answer your questions.

deals_news.label: Deals & new arrivals:
deals_news.body: Access to exclusive promotions and newly arrived products.

ux_note.title: UX note:
ux_note.body_1: This page was designed following usability and accessibility principles: color contrast, readable typography, clear structure, and consistent navigation.
ux_note.body_2: Our goal is for any user, regardless of digital experience, to shop comfortably and safely.

about.thanks: Thanks for trusting Limoneo. Your satisfaction is our priority!
about.final_note: A clearer purchase flow, faster support, and a catalog designed to explore without friction.

contact.title: Contact
contact.subtitle: Have questions or suggestions? We're here to help!
contact.support_body: Have questions or suggestions? We are here to help with orders, incidents, and buying recommendations.
contact.response_title: We reply as soon as possible
contact.response_body: Questions about orders, returns, payments, and general support in one channel.
contact.channel_body: Leave us the context and we will reply with the precise information needed to resolve it.
contact.form_body: Tell us what you need and we will reply by email.
contact.footer_help: We will reply to the email provided with the next step or resolution.

create_account.question: How can I create an account?
create_account.answer: Click "Sign in" and then select "Create account". Fill out the form with your details and follow the instructions.

payment_methods.question: What payment methods are accepted?
payment_methods.answer: We accept credit cards, debit cards, and secure electronic payments.

order_tracking.question: How do I track my order?
order_tracking.answer: Go to your user dashboard and select "My orders" to see the status and details of your purchases.

returns.question: Can I return a product?
returns.answer: Yes, you can request a return within 14 days of receiving the product, as long as it is in its original condition.

support_contact.question: How do I contact support?
support_contact.answer: You can write to us from the contact page or email support@limoneo.com.

privacy.title: Privacy policy
privacy.intro: At Limoneo, your privacy matters. This policy explains how we collect, use, and protect your personal information.

collected.title: 1. Information we collect
collected.body: We collect data you provide when you register, make purchases, or contact support, such as name, email, address, and payment details.

usage.title: 2. How we use information
usage.body: We use your data to process orders, improve your experience, send relevant notifications, and comply with legal obligations.

protection.title: 3. Data protection
protection.body: We implement security measures to protect your information against unauthorized access, alteration, or disclosure.

sharing.title: 4. Sharing information
sharing.body: We do not share your personal data with third parties, except to process payments, shipping, or when required by law.

cookies.title: 5. Cookies
cookies.body: We use cookies to improve navigation and personalize your experience. You can manage your preferences at any time.

rights.title: 6. Your rights
rights.body_prefix: You can access, update, or delete your personal data by contacting us through the

changes.title: 7. Policy changes
changes.body: We reserve the right to update this policy. We'll notify you of important changes via the website or email.

terms.title: Terms of service
terms.intro: Welcome to Limoneo. By accessing and using our website, you agree to comply with the following terms and conditions. If you disagree with any part, please do not use our services.

use_site.title: 1. Website use
use_site.body: You agree to use this site only for lawful and personal purposes. Fraudulent activities, copying content, or interfering with the site's operation is not allowed.

purchases_payments.title: 2. Purchases and payments
purchases_payments.body: All prices are shown in local currency and include applicable taxes. We reserve the right to change prices and products without notice. Payments are processed securely through authorized providers.

shipping_returns.title: 3. Shipping and returns
shipping_returns.body: Delivery times are estimates and may vary. You can request a return within 14 days of receiving a product, as long as it is in its original condition.

ip.title: 4. Intellectual property
ip.body: All content on this site, including text, images, and logos, is owned by Limoneo or its providers and is protected by copyright.

modifications.title: 5. Updates
modifications.body: We reserve the right to update these terms at any time. We recommend reviewing them periodically.

contact.title: 6. Contact
contact.body_prefix: If you have any questions, you can contact us through the

results.title: Product results
results.subtitle: Adjust filters, sort by price or rating, and find the ideal product.

summary.tip: Tip: try more specific keywords or adjust the filters.

empty.title: No matches found
empty.body: Check spelling, try a related category, or clear some filters.

script_modes.detalle: Add images to an existing product (detail)

errors.auth_required: You need to sign in to view scripts.
errors.admin_only: You don't have permission to view scripts (admin only).
errors.scripts_empty: No available scripts were returned by the API.

page.title: Link aggregator
page.subtitle: Control and document extractions by running authorized scripts from a single view.
steps: 1. Select a script and review its quick guide.
2. Paste product or page HTML to analyze.
3. Run, review the summary, and share results.

default.title: Quick guide
default.description: Select a script, paste product HTML, and run to get processed links.
steps: Review the selected script description to understand its purpose.
Validate that the HTML fragment contains the information you need to analyze.
Press Run script and review the summary and generated output.
default.expected: Output will show detected links or steps completed by the script.
default.notes: If you need additional parameters, add them in the HTML or contact the script owner.

verify_env.title: Environment diagnostics
verify_env.description: Confirm Python dependencies and paths are configured correctly before extracting links.
steps: Run this script without additional HTML to validate the environment.
Check that each verification reports OK status.
If a problem is detected, fix the indicated dependency before continuing with other scripts.
verify_env.expected: Output should list each dependency as OK or provide the required fix details.
verify_env.notes: Repeat diagnostics whenever you update libraries or change Python versions.

dynamic.title: Quick guide for {name}
dynamic.description: Use this script to automate a specific flow. Check internal docs if additional setup is required.
steps: Verify output and save evidence if required.
If you get errors, review the summary or run diagnostics.
dynamic.expected: The script should show a summary of collected links or executed actions.
dynamic.notes: If you don't recognize the script name, validate with the process owner before running it.

config.title: Configure execution
config.subtitle: Choose the script and confirm the input contains all required data.

input.title: Product HTML
input.subtitle: Paste the exact block you want to process. Analysis runs on the server.
input.tip: Tip: keep unique attributes (classes, data-* or ids) so the script can identify the right elements.

run.title: Run script
run.subtitle: You'll get a summary with execution status, elapsed time, and full output.

diagnostic.title: Environment diagnostics
diagnostic.note: Diagnostics run with verify_env.py and validate dependencies before processing other scripts.

history.title: Recent history
history.empty: Run a script to start building history.

output.title: Script output
output.empty: Run a script to view detailed output.

tech_notes.title: Quick technical notes
tech_notes.validate_body: avoid incomplete tags or embedded scripts that can break the parser.
tech_notes.diagnostic_body: if a script fails, check verify_env.py first to ensure dependencies are still available.
tech_notes.evidence_body: keep textual output or export it if you need to share with other teams.

docs.title: Documentation
docs.body: Laravel has wonderful documentation covering every aspect of the framework. Whether you are a newcomer or have prior experience with Laravel, we recommend reading the documentation from beginning to end.

laracasts.title: Laracasts
laracasts.body: Laracasts offers thousands of video tutorials on Laravel, PHP, and JavaScript development. Check them out and massively level up your development skills in the process.

news.title: Laravel News
news.body: Laravel News is a community-driven portal and newsletter aggregating the latest and most important news in the Laravel ecosystem, including new package releases and tutorials.

ecosystem.title: Vibrant ecosystem
ecosystem.part_1: Laravel's robust library of first-party tools and libraries, such as
ecosystem.part_4: help you take your projects to the next level. Pair them with powerful open source libraries like

orders_module.subtitle: Operational view with order-line hierarchy and specific actions for partial cancellations and returns.

header.title: Welcome back
header.subtitle: Monitor business health, make decisions, and act quickly.

performance.title: Commercial performance
performance.chart_placeholder: Integrate a weekly revenue chart here to complete the visualization.

recent_orders.empty: No recent orders. Encourage your team to create promotions or launch campaigns.

quick_actions.subtitle: Frequent shortcuts to speed up operations.

featured_products.empty: Add your best-performing products to track them from here.

alerts.title: Alerts
alerts.empty: Everything is in order. No pending alerts.

timeline.title: Team activity
timeline.no_activity_description: Team and system movements will appear here.

autumn.heading_default: Explore the latest curated collections and standout finds
autumn.subtitle: Find quick ideas to refresh your spaces, your style, and your favorite moments.

coffee.title: Artisanal mugs with infusions
coffee.description: A collection of ceramic cups and spiced blends ready to gift.

bakery.title: Fresh seasonal pastry picks
bakery.description: Sweet packs and special details for gatherings and gifting.

wellness.title: Diffusers and essential oils
wellness.description: Forest, vanilla, and citrus notes for a warm atmosphere.

autumn_flash.title: Featured flash sale
autumn_flash.message: Take advantage of limited-time discounts across a curated catalog selection.
autumn_flash.detail: Built for fast decisions: less noise, more ready-to-ship references.
autumn_flash.benefit_primary: Curated selection that reduces comparison fatigue.
autumn_flash.benefit_secondary: Offer conditions stay clear before checkout starts.

bundle_warm.title: Cozy home bundle
bundle_warm.message: Combine home products and accessories with optimized shipping in one purchase.
bundle_warm.detail: Useful when you want to raise basket value without making the choice harder.
bundle_warm.benefit_primary: Compatible products grouped to reduce purchase friction.
bundle_warm.benefit_secondary: Strong value message even in quick mobile sessions.

category_extra.title: 10% extra in your category
category_extra.message: Use coupon CATEGORIA10 at checkout on featured products.
category_extra.detail: The incentive appears in context, right when the user is evaluating the category.
category_extra.benefit_primary: Anchors the discount to one clear action.
category_extra.benefit_secondary: Sends users to the relevant block without opening a parallel path.

free_shipping.title: Free express shipping
free_shipping.message: 48h delivery available on items labeled for fast shipping.
free_shipping.detail: Useful when delivery speed matters more than pure discount.
free_shipping.benefit_primary: Reduces doubts about speed and cost before product detail.
free_shipping.benefit_secondary: Keeps the offer visible without covering the main content.

banner.title: Your privacy deserves a clear decision, not a confusing banner.
banner.description: We use functional cookies to keep the store working smoothly and, only if you allow it, analytics and marketing cookies to measure performance and personalize campaigns.
banner.secondary: You can accept everything, keep only the essentials, or customize each category in seconds.
banner.footer_note: Your choice is saved and can be reviewed later from the cookie policy.

customize.title: Decide which data you allow us to use
customize.description: This setup is designed so you can understand the impact of each category without legal noise breaking the flow.
customize.info_title: What changes when optional categories are disabled
customize.info_body: The store will keep working, but some performance measurement, recommendations, and remarketing campaigns will no longer be available.

functional.label: Functional cookies
functional.summary: Keep session, language, and basic purchase continuity.
functional.description: They are necessary to browse, sign in, keep the cart, and preserve the storefront's minimum working preferences.

analytics.label: Analytics cookies
analytics.summary: Help us detect which parts of the journey work best.
analytics.description: They measure page views, catalog interaction, and campaign performance so we can improve UX and conversion.

marketing.label: Marketing cookies
marketing.summary: Used to personalize messages and reduce irrelevant campaign pressure.
marketing.description: They enable audience targeting and promotional tracking so offers are more aligned with actual interest.
